name: feishu-codex-orchestrator
description: Connect a Feishu bot to local Codex requirement analysis and implementation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Control local Codex requirement workflows from Feishu.
interface.longDescription: Receives Feishu bot mentions and quoted replies, routes requirements to configured repositories, resumes the matching local Codex thread, and returns analysis or execution checkpoints as cards.
defaultPrompt: 配置飞书机器人与本地 Codex 网关。
查看飞书需求网关和活动任务状态。
处理我从飞书机器人提交的软件需求。
